All requested features verified: underlined section titles, NAME/EMAIL order swap in Client Information, and four new fields (Assumed Marital Status, Hobbies/Interests, University/College, Year/s of Attendance) present in both Admin and Client print layouts.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Print layout alignment testing completed. Both AdminPage and AnalyzePage have matching print layouts with: (1) underlined section titles using .section-title CSS class with text-decoration: underline, (2) NAME/EMAIL order corrected in CLIENT INFORMATION section, (3) four new fields added to PROFILE INFORMATION section. The print functionality opens a new window with window.open() which may be blocked by browser popup blockers in automated testing, but the HTML generation code is verified correct.
